subcodes.first_line: God willing, through the grace of the All-Merciful and the outpourings of the True Bestower of bounties, mayest thou attain His favors. And now, thy letter hath appeared before the Most Great Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت رحمانی بفیوضات فیاض حقیقی فائز باشی و بعد کتابت بمنظر اکبر
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for spiritual recognition
